# Public Folder - For Production Images

This folder is for static assets that need to work on GitHub Pages.

## How to Add the Mobile App Images

To make the images show on GitHub Pages, save these two files here:

1. **`mobile-app-demo.png`** - For Slide 4 ("The VM Problem")
2. **`note-feature-demo.png`** - For Slide 11 ("Note Feature")

Then update the imports in the slide files as described in `/VIDEO_PROBLEM_EXPLAINED.md`.

## Note

Images in this folder will be automatically copied to the production build and accessible at the root URL (e.g., `/mobile-app-demo.png`).
